title: Sum of Numbers
statement: Given N integers, print their sum.
inputDescription: The first line contains N. The second line contains N space-separated integers.
outputDescription: Print one integer, the sum of all given numbers.

hints.content: Read N first, then read the list of numbers.
Use a running total or the built-in sum function.

explanation: After parsing the integers, add every element exactly once. This is O(N) time and O(N) memory if the list is stored.
answerCode:
n = int(input())
numbers = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(sum(numbers))

title: Two Sum Exists
statement: Given N integers and a target K, print YES if two different positions have values whose sum is K. Otherwise print NO.
inputDescription: The first line contains N and K. The second line contains N space-separated integers.
outputDescription: Print YES if a valid pair exists, otherwise print NO.

hints.content: Checking every pair is too slow for the largest input.
While scanning values, remember numbers you have already seen.
For each value x, check whether K - x is already in a set.

explanation: Use a set of previously seen numbers. For each x, if K - x is already present, a valid pair exists. Insert x after the check so the same position is not reused.
